title: Martech Summit 2026 — Agentic AI & Intelligent Action
description: AKA Digital's flagship annual summit returns in 2026. This year's theme: the Agentic AI ecosystem and how autonomous AI agents are transforming marketing operations across Southeast Asia.

title: Hanoi Data Solution Summit 2024
description: 120 C-level executives gathered in Hanoi to explore AI-driven marketing, first-party data strategies, and the future of customer engagement across Southeast Asia.

title: Martech Summit 2025
description: AKA Digital hosted Vietnam's premier annual MarTech event — From Data Chaos to Performance Delivery. Leading brands discuss AI, automation, and zero-party data.

title: Martech Summit 2024 — Look Back
description: Hundreds of marketing leaders joined AKA Digital for a deep dive into personalisation at scale, CDP architecture, and the evolving MarTech landscape.

title: Martech Innovation Day 2023
description: A landmark industry gathering showcasing the latest innovations in marketing automation, analytics, and customer data platforms in Vietnam.

title: MMA Smarties Awards 2022
description: AKA Digital's campaign for FE Credit earned Silver at the MMA Smarties Awards — Southeast Asia's premier mobile marketing recognition.

title: CDP Deepdive Workshop
description: In collaboration with mParticle — an intensive workshop for heads of technology and marketing exploring Customer Data Platform architecture.

title: Mixpanel vs. GA4 Roundtable
description: Product, Data, and Marketing leaders debated the role of real-time insights in growth — and when to choose Mixpanel over Google Analytics.

title: DSS 2024 — Partner Workshop
description: Exclusive breakout sessions with Mixpanel, mParticle, Netcore, and OneSignal — hands-on demos and architecture sessions for enterprise teams.
